summary: Refactor regression testing completed. Found and fixed critical bug: missing Loader2 import in JobsItinerary.jsx after sub-component extraction. All 7 backend tests pass. All UI flows verified after fix.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: ReferenceError: Loader2 is not defined — Loader2 was used at line 289 in JobsItinerary.jsx but missing from lucide-react import after refactor. Added Loader2 to import on line 8.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <option> (line 425 in CrewDashboard.jsx, line 579 in ContractorDashboard.jsx) — pre-existing issue, not related to this refactor

action_items: DONE: Fixed missing Loader2 import in JobsItinerary.jsx
LOW: Fix <span> inside <option> hydration warning in CrewDashboard.jsx line 425 and ContractorDashboard.jsx line 579
critical_code_review_comments: Loader2 import was dropped during sub-component extraction refactor of JobsItinerary.jsx — caused page crash for all users. Fixed by adding Loader2 to lucide-react import.
When doing sub-component extraction refactors, always verify that all icons/utilities still imported in the parent file match what's actually used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /jobs-itinerary route (not /itinerary) is the itinerary page. Auth flow: navigate to / then click Log In → goes to /auth?mode=login. All refactored sub-components render correctly. Contractor dashboard at /contractor/dashboard shows map+crew search+jobs list. Profile page shows SocialShareButtons. Admin analytics API returns all required fields (total_users, crew_count, active_jobs, total_revenue). Pre-existing hydration warning about <span> inside <option> in dashboards is not a blocker.
rca_of_the_issue: During P1 refactor of JobsItinerary.jsx (894→424 lines), the original import 'import { CalendarDays, Search, ChevronRight, Loader2 } from lucide-react' was trimmed to remove Loader2. However Loader2 is still used on line 289 of JobsItinerary.jsx for the loading spinner (not moved to sub-components). Fix: add Loader2 back to the import.
